name: Jessa Rae Photography Crested Butte, Colorado

reviews.text: I was absolutely jaw-dropped when Jessa sent me our engagement photos. She is incredible! Not only are her photos literally out of a dreamy magazine, but she is also so great to work with. My finance and I wouldn't consider ourselves photogenic in the slightest, but Jessa did a wonderful job walking us through the session and how/where to stand, etc. She is a kind individual who made us feel like we were the only couple in the world. I can't wait to see what she captures on our wedding day. We will be using her for all things photo-related in the future!

We had an engagement photo session in Crested Butte with Jessa. She was very communicative and friendly, and knew of a great location with lots of beautiful wildflowers. Our final photos were absolutely gorgeous. We're very happy with the results of our session, and absolutely recommend Jessa if you're looking to do a photo session in Crested Butte!

Jessa did our wedding photos this past July and was absolutely amazing. My husband and I hate doing photos and are not photographic and she made us feel so comfortable and captured amazing shots. I wanted lightly edited pics with mountains, water and wildflowers and she was able to capture exactly what I wanted.

Jessa is incredible! 🌟

We recently travelled to elope in CB in October, and had picked out a few viewpoints for our photos ahead of time. The day of, after some previous snowfall that had melted and washed out some of the roads, we had to make some last minute adjustments.

Jessa took the time to scope out the road conditions the morning of, and came back with some suggestions for alternative locations. She absolutely nailed it, and I didn’t even care that our original plans fell through! She guided us through the mountain roads, and knew all of the best spots for photos along the way. On top of being the best guide, she took stunning photos of us, all while keeping us relaxed and comfortable on our big day. Bonus points to her for bringing her dog along with her; he kept us laughing and thinking about our own dog back home.

I couldn’t have asked for a better photographer to document our best day ever. Jessa is the best! 🤍

Jessa is a wonderful mountain photographer that anyone would be lucky to get for their portraits! We did portraits up Brush Creek and it was raining but she made it work and we ended up with beautiful photos of our family and our twin girls! She was very professional, passionate about getting a great shot and wonderful with the kiddos! Highly recommend!
